positive: A central, stylized illustration of a friendly astronaut floating among orbiting geometric planets and cosmic nebulas. The astronaut is wearing a clean, retro-futuristic suit with bright primary colors and minimalist details. The scene should feature sharp, clean vector-art elements—geometric planets, flowing star trails, and abstract nebula clouds—all arranged in a dynamic, highly symmetrical, and cohesive composition. Style: Bold, linocut-inspired vector illustration, reminiscent of mid-century atomic age poster art, high contrast, with a limited palette of cyan, magenta, yellow, and deep navy blue. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, crisp lines, flat color blocks, deep black outlines, clean silhouette focus. Composition must be visually centered and easily reproducible on a textile surface.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, artifact, noise, poorly drawn, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, sketch, realistic photograph, low resolution
